History
[
]

Brilliant Void Star System
 was the original name but later changed to "Alliance Star System" after the 
Cultivation Alliance
 rose to power. 

The 
Rain Celestial Realm
 existed above it in the past.

Cultivators
[
]

In the Brilliant Void Star System, slaughter is part of the daily life. Those that could survive and reach the 2nd Step or the peak of the 1st Step have all been through a lot. They are all as sly as a fox and extremely cunning.

Structure
[
]

The 
Cultivation Alliance
 is the administrative body of this starsystem. It is split into two sects, four temples, and eight realms.

The Peak
[
]

In the 
Alliance Star System
, a rank 7 cultivation planet is the peak existence on the surface.

Rank 8 cultivation planets are very rare, so much so that the entire 
Alliance Star System
 only has three. As for the most mysterious rank 9 cultivation planet, there is only one in the entire 
Alliance Star System
.

Rankings
[
]

Countries are ranked from 1 to 5, based on the cultivation level of their strongest member

Rank 1 country has a 
Foundation Establishment
 cultivator at its peak

Rank 2 country has a 
Core Formation
 cultivator at its peak

Rank 3 country has a 
Nascent Soul
 cultivator at its peak

Rank 4 country has a 
Soul Formation
 cultivator at its peak

Rank 4 and above countries receive resources from the Alliance in exchange for services and are obliged to respond to a call to arms if given.

Rank 5 country has a 
Soul Transformation
 cultivator at its peak

Rank 6 country has a 
Ascendent
 cultivator at its peak. Moreover, the Cultivation Alliance gives the country a cultivation planet along with the 
Cultivation Planet Crystal
 to control its people.

[
]

Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
